description_long: This is a three-seater couch featuring deep burgundy, tufted cushions for both the seat and backrest, set within a robust wooden frame. The wood is dark-stained and ornately carved, with decorative motifs visible on the front and sides, adding a touch of classical elegance. The armrests are wide, gently rolled, and seamlessly integrated into the frame, providing both comfort and visual continuity. The legs are short, square, and exposed, supporting the substantial frame while maintaining a low profile. The back of the couch is fully enclosed with wood, also adorned with carved detailing, making it visually appealing from all angles. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional craftsmanship and plush comfort, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, parks, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A richly upholstered, burgundy three-seater couch with deep tufted cushions and an ornately carved dark wood frame, featuring wide rolled armrests and decorative detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing three deep burgundy tufted seat and back cushions, wide rolled wooden armrests, and carved wood details on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rolled wooden armrest, the profile of the tufted cushions, and the carved grape motif on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed wooden back with a large central carved motif and the tops of the back cushions barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with the same rolled armrest and carved grape motif, showing the depth and structure of the couch.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, rectangular seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all tufted and closely fitted; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy fabric with visible tufting and button details, creating a subtle grid pattern on both seat and back cushions.
attribute_leg_style: Short, square, exposed wooden legs, dark-stained to match the frame, with minimal height and no additional ornamentation.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, rolled wooden armrests integrated into the frame, featuring carved detailing and a gently curved profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with three individual, tufted cushions attached to the frame, providing a structured yet cushioned appearance.
